description_for_human: Autonomous open-source AI desktop agent for Linux with multi-LLM support, VNC desktop control, WhatsApp integration, RAG knowledge base, and MCP tool server integration.
description_for_model: Jarvis is a self-hosted autonomous AI agent that controls a full Linux desktop environment via VNC. It supports multiple LLM providers (Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, OpenRouter, Ollama), multi-agent orchestration, RAG with ChromaDB vector database, MCP tool servers, WhatsApp messaging, face recognition, and an extensible skill system via OpenClaw marketplace. Install via Docker or curl script. AGPL-3.0 licensed.
